title: AI Action Governance Gateway Market Comparison Suite
evidenceBoundary: This suite defines a common workload and scoring rubric. Scores are only valid when every vendor is evaluated with the same suite, same environment notes, and recorded evidence.

criteria.label: Pre-execution policy gate
criteria.description: Can the platform make an allow/block/review decision before the action executes?

criteria.label: Tool/action risk classification
criteria.description: Can individual tools/actions be assigned risk levels that influence execution?

criteria.label: Human approval gate
criteria.description: Can high-risk actions require explicit approval before execution?

criteria.label: Customer keeps API keys
criteria.description: Can customers retain execution inside their own runtime without giving the governance layer production API keys?

criteria.label: Connector execution
criteria.description: Can the platform execute a connector or webhook when configured to do so?

criteria.label: Audit hash proof
criteria.description: Does the platform return request/decision/record hashes or equivalent tamper-evident proof?

criteria.label: Audit export
criteria.description: Can evidence be exported for review?

criteria.label: Replay/history visibility
criteria.description: Can reviewers inspect historical executions or proof events?

criteria.label: Fail-closed behavior
criteria.description: Does the platform block or fail closed when evidence cannot be written or provider execution fails?

criteria.label: Public reproducible benchmark evidence
criteria.description: Is there a repeatable benchmark command/report that reviewers can rerun?

scoreScale.1: Possible only with substantial custom work or external glue
scoreScale.2: Supported natively or by documented first-party pattern with evidence

workloads.description: Register a connector, map it to a tool, run a governed execution, and return proof fields.
Request a pre-execution decision, let customer runtime execute, commit the result, and export proof.
Show that failed provider/evidence paths do not silently pass.
